title: BidirectionalAudio
description: Configuration for bidirectional audio streaming over a websocket connection. When enabled, the remote websocket endpoint can send audio back to jambonz to be played to the caller.

enabled.description: Whether to enable bidirectional audio on the websocket connection.

streaming.description: If true, audio is streamed continuously rather than sent as complete messages.

sampleRate.description: The sample rate in Hz for bidirectional audio.
